name: Elementor
description: Elementor — WordPress visual page builder with live front-end editing, widget library, and WooCommerce integration.

seo.title: Elementor — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Elementor: Elementor — WordPress visual page builder with live front-end editing, widget library, and WooCommerce integration.

when_to_use: Visual drag-and-drop WordPress site building without coding
WooCommerce product page design with Elementor widgets
Marketing landing pages with A/B testing via Elementor Pro
Agency site building with reusable templates and theme builder
Dynamic content widgets connected to ACF custom fields

cons: Plugin bloat hurts Core Web Vitals
review.verdict: The leading WordPress visual builder, but a performance and lock-in tax on any serious site.
review.best_for: Freelancers and agencies building WordPress sites fast
review.not_for: Teams chasing top Lighthouse scores and portable markup

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock

lock_in.reason: WP builder shortcodes bind to plugin
